title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Semantics Case: Error Types
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js error types increment in a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Differentiate syntax, reference, type, range, aggregate, DOM, and domain errors by evidence and recovery boundary.
Enforce constructor and method invariants with changed-case tests rather than relying on nominal class names.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
